summaryAm: ጉንዳኑ ለነገ ሲዘጋጅ አንበጣው ዛሬን በደስታ ይዘፍናል፤ በመጨረሻም መዘጋጀትና መረዳዳት እንደሚጠቅም የሚያሳይ ታሪክ።
moralAm: መዘጋጀት ጥሩ ነው፤ ያለንን በርኅራኄ መካፈልም ደግነት ነው።

source.name: Aesop's Fables
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with a compassionate ending.

pages.textAm: በሞቃት ቀን አንድ ጉንዳን ትንንሽ ዘሮችን ወደ ቤቱ ይወስድ ነበር። በቀስታ ይሄድ፣ በደስታም ይሠራ ነበር።
pages.textEn: On a warm day, an ant carried tiny seeds home and worked happily.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A cheerful ant carrying tiny seeds through a warm sunny garden path.

pages.textAm: አንበጣው በአበቦች መካከል ተቀምጦ ይዘፍን ነበር። “ጉንዳን ሆይ፣ ና ትንሽ ተጫወት!” አለው።
pages.textEn: The grasshopper sang among the flowers and invited the ant to play.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A friendly grasshopper singing among flowers while inviting the ant to play.

pages.textAm: ጉንዳኑ ፈገግ አለ። “መጫወት ደስ ይላል፣ ግን ነገ ሲቀዘቅዝ ምግብ እንዲኖረኝ እዘጋጃለሁ” አለ።
pages.textEn: The ant smiled and said he was preparing food for colder days.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The ant smiling kindly while explaining preparation to the grasshopper.

pages.textAm: ቀናት አለፉ። ጉንዳኑ ትንሽ ትንሽ ሰብስቦ ቤቱን ሞላ። አንበጣውም ዘፈኑን ቀጠለ።
pages.textEn: Days passed. The ant gathered little by little, and the grasshopper kept singing.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The ant storing seeds in a cozy home while the grasshopper sings outside.

pages.textAm: አንድ ጠዋት ነፋስ ቀዝቃዛ ሆነ። አንበጣው ምግብ ፈለገ፣ ግን ያዘጋጀው አልነበረም።
pages.textEn: One morning the wind became cold. The grasshopper looked for food but had not prepared any.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The grasshopper looking concerned on a cool morning, with gentle non-scary weather.

pages.textAm: አንበጣው ወደ ጉንዳኑ ቤት ሄደ። “እባክህ ትንሽ ልትረዳኝ ትችላለህ?” ብሎ በትህትና ጠየቀ።
pages.textEn: The grasshopper went to the ant's home and politely asked for help.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The grasshopper politely asking the ant for help at a small cozy doorway.

pages.textAm: ጉንዳኑ በርኅራኄ ተመለከተው። “እካፈልሃለሁ፣ ነገ ግን አብረን እንዘጋጅ” አለው።
pages.textEn: The ant looked kindly at him and said they could share and prepare together next time.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The ant kindly sharing seeds with the grasshopper inside a warm cozy home.

pages.textAm: ከዚያ ቀን በኋላ አንበጣው ዘፈኑን አልተወም፣ ግን መዘጋጀትንም ተማረ። ጉንዳኑም መካፈል ደስታ እንደሚያመጣ አወቀ።
pages.textEn: After that day, the grasshopper still sang, but he also learned to prepare.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The ant and grasshopper working and singing together in a warm garden.
